note: Shared world events. Add or edit entries here; the calendar and dashboard read this file. 'date' is ISO (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional 'end' for ranges.

events.title: Mini Golf Open Beta
events.desc: Test the Mini Golf course, scoring, and report problems before the full release.

events.title: Piglin Plaza Construction Begins
events.desc: Ground breaks on the Nether's major travel hub.

events.title: Mini Golf Official Release
events.desc: Mini Golf opens to the public — themed holes, ticket rewards, and leaderboards.

events.title: Hide and Seek v3 (Lumen Field)
events.desc: The Extreme Lumen Field Stadium map with a 20-minute timer is expected this month.

events.title: Piglin Plaza Grand Opening
events.desc: The Nether travel hub opens with shops, production plants, and monorail access.

events.title: BreachPoint Launch
events.desc: The tactical attack-and-defense attraction launches with objective gameplay, team missions, and leaderboards.

events.title: Mob Arena Launch
events.desc: Wave-based survival combat with difficulty scaling, team survival, and rewards.

events.title: BrainSurge Launch
events.desc: Game-show style knowledge challenges, timed questions, and score tracking.
